summary: The implementation covers most requirements with a backend data model, CRUD operations, frontend filtering, best deals section, and warm color scheme. However, several acceptance criteria are partially or not implemented: distance display for items, empty state messaging, prominent discount display in deals, and full responsive design verification is limited by truncated files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display distance from user's location for each item
missing_requirements.reason: The distance calculation exists in utils/distanceCalculator.ts and is used in MainPage filtering, but ClearanceItemCard only displays distance conditionally when the distance prop is provided. The MainPage does not pass the distance prop when rendering the main list (ClearanceItemsList), only when location filtering is active.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clear indication when no items are found within the radius
missing_requirements.reason: The ClearanceItemsList component shows a generic 'No items found' message when items array is empty, but does not specifically indicate when the empty state is due to location radius filtering versus other filters.

missing_requirements.requirement: At least top 10-20 deals are displayed
missing_requirements.reason: BestDealsSection displays top 12 deals (.slice(0, 12)), which falls within the 10-20 range but is hardcoded to 12 rather than explicitly showing 10-20 as specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode theme support with ThemeProvider and dark mode color palette
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention dark mode or theme switching. The implementation includes ThemeProvider from next-themes and extensive dark mode color definitions in index.css.

hallucinated_features.description: Authentication system with Internet Identity integration
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goals explicitly state 'User accounts or authentication' should not be implemented, yet the codebase includes InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, and AuthClient integration throughout.
BuildRequest does not mention toast notifications or user feedback mechanisms. The App component includes a Toaster component from sonner library.
